items.name: Desk Plant
items.description: A leafy fern that makes the office feel alive.

items.name: Framed Diploma
items.description: Hang your credentials with pride on the back wall.

items.name: Brass Desk Lamp
items.description: Warm light for late-night grading sessions.

items.name: Persian Rug
items.description: Softens the floor and impresses visiting faculty.

items.name: Teaching Trophy
items.description: A shiny award displayed on your desk.

items.name: Motivational Poster
items.description: READ MORE BOOKS — in bold, inspiring letters.

items.name: Reputation Charm
items.description: +1 bonus reputation on every correct grade next work day.

items.name: Mistake Shield
items.description: Your first wrong grade next work day costs no reputation.

items.name: Coffee Stash
items.description: Receive $50 bonus cash when the next work day begins.
